course_title: INTRODUCTION TO HUMAN FACTORS ENGINEERING LABORATORY
description: Hands on experience applying concepts discussed inI SY E/​PSYCH  349. Complete a small three-part design project. Learn how to measure light, sound, anthropometric, and psychophysiological data, and then apply these measurements to product and workplace design challenges.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Industrial Engineering and concurrent enrollment inI SY E/​PSYCH  349, or member of Engineering Guest Students
